title: Implement property improvement, construction and repair
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement property improvement, construction and repair demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess property condition

pcs.text: Confirm work plan and priorities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work plan and priorities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work plan and priorities with supervisor.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess property structures for soundness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess property structures for soundness.

pcs.text: Identify and determine property improvements and maintenance requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and determine property improvements and maintenance requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor that planning and permissions have been obtained where required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor that planning and permissions have been obtained where required.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.
